title: Non-record: PR315 repro on 1xH100 PCIe, int6+zstd (val_bpb=1.8338)
body:
## Summary
- Based on PR #315 recipe (XSA+EMA+PartialRoPE+LateQAT), adapted for 1xH100 PCIe
- Flash Attention 2 instead of FA3
- Training schedule adjusted for 1GPU (WARMDOWN_ITERS=400, MOMENTUM_WARMUP=200)
- Sliding-window val_bpb=1.8338, artifact 10.0MB (int6+zstd)

## Notes
- 1GPU limits to ~492 steps (vs ~6200 on 8xH100)
- QAT had only ~40 steps of adaptation due to limited training budget

## Test plan
- [x] Training completes within 10min wallclock
- [x] Artifact under 16MB (10.0MB)
- [x] int6+zstd roundtrip eval passes
